title: How Anthropic Engineers ACTUALLY Prompt Claude Code
summary: Austin Marchese extracts four rules from how Anthropic engineers prompt Claude Code: prompt for skills rather than one-off tasks, structure skills as composable and reusable units that evolve across sessions, save scripts within skills, and control invocation access. The content argues most people approach prompting incorrectly and these patterns apply universally to AI projects.
